use_codes.desc: NORLIQVA IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF HYPERTENSION, TO LOWER BLOOD PRESSURE IN ADULTS AND CHILDREN 6 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
NORLIQVA IS INDICATED FOR THE SYMPTOMATIC TREATMENT OF CHRONIC STABLE ANGINA
NORLIQVA IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF CONFIRMED OR SUSPECTED VASOSPASTIC ANGINA

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
NORLIQVA® is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure in adults
and children 6 years of age and older. Lowering blood pressure reduces the risk of fatal and
nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have
...
